mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, user_id, parent_id, content, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
